source_data_path: decision record (banked probe spec; see internal_lineage)
caveat: Probe spec of record. The scope-lock is the hardest-working line in this episode: this probe supervises the density DIRECTLY, at a reduced grid, for a bounded step count -- it does not touch the flux-supervised regime, and the acquittal it delivers is an acquittal of the clamp AS THE CAUSE OF THIS COLLAPSE, at this scope; never 'the head plays no role anywhere.' Cost is stated as-spent (host-only, $0 paid, always host-scale by design -- there was no paid stage to save here). Single realization / fixed cosmology; z=0.3 scope-lock.
